category_title: Students without behavior problems who demonstrate higher rates of active and passive engagement
minimal_context: The student is sitting at their desk working on an assigned reading and writing task during teacher-directed academic instruction.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please sit at your desk and complete the assigned reading and writing tasks.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly at the desk, tracking the materials with eyes, and then raises hand to respond to the instruction.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone, just keep working on your own.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps hand raised, attempting to actively engage with the instruction and respond to the teacher.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at your own papers and keep reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Drops hand, stops reading and writing, and becomes completely off-task after the raised hand is ignored.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please sit at your desk and complete the assigned reading and writing tasks.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly at the desk, tracking the materials with eyes, and then raises hand to respond to the instruction.)

TUTOR: Everyone, just keep working on your own.

STUDENT: (Keeps hand raised, attempting to actively engage with the instruction and respond to the teacher.)

TUTOR: Look at your own papers and keep reading.

STUDENT: (Drops hand, stops reading and writing, and becomes completely off-task after the raised hand is ignored.)

task.content: Engaging with instruction via choral responding, raising hand, responding to teacher instruction, writing, reading or otherwise completing assigned tasks

context.environment: Teacher-directed academic instruction in reading, math, social studies, or science
context.social_setting: Classrooms, where students spend the majority of their time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Teachers tended not to respond to students even when the student appropriately elicited such with a raised hand
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Act in a negative manner to garner teacher attention and become off-task
related_quotes: act in a negative manner to garner teacher attention

behavior_patterns.condition: When no task or expectations were apparent (down time)
related_quotes: coded as “down time,” indicating no task or expectations were apparent

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Sitting quietly at desk and facing the teacher who is instructing and a student sitting quietly with collaborative work group but not actively speaking, writing, or otherwise working on an activity
